sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the image, the character has moved down and now the red blocks are more deeply inside the green rectangle. The character's red blocks appear to be filling the hole in the green rectangle. Let me check the current segmentation to see the state of the green rectangle and whether the hole is being filled.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'R', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(r for r,c in b)
        maxr = max(r for r,c in b)
        minc = min(c for r,c in b)
        maxc = max(c for r,c in b)
        print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=({minr},{maxr},{minc},{maxc}) children={n['children']}")

# Check ASCII
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Green rect area ===")
for i in range(28, 50):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][36:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
